creator: nmh@t3x.org
text:
- Update to 2006-10-05
- Added syntax transformers

Fix: 

-- 
Nils M Holm <nmh@t3x.org> -- http://www.t3x.org/nmh/--fgCCMY8hqW2cJrtQSNJLLtDTUg4tOntXLUwnmm4ryZyc2Kxa

diff -ru lang/sketchy-old/Makefile lang/sketchy/Makefile
--- lang/sketchy-old/Makefile	Sun Sep 24 11:50:32 2006
+++ lang/sketchy/Makefile	Thu Oct  5 10:02:03 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	sketchy
-PORTVERSION=	20060924
+PORTVERSION=	20061005
 CATEGORIES=	lang devel lisp scheme
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.t3x.org/files/
